institution.name: Penn State Health Hershey Medical Center
aliases: Penn State College of Medicine — Visiting Students

searchTermsTried: Penn State College of Medicine Hershey visiting medical student VSLO international elective

candidateFindings.pageTitle: Visiting DO and MD Students | Fourth-Year Electives
candidateFindings.shortQuote: medical students in good standing in their final year from medical schools accredited by the Liaison Committee on Medical Education (LCME) and the American Osteopathic Association (AOA) within the United States and Canada

negativeEvidence.strongNegativeEvidence: Restricted to LCME or AOA schools within US OR Canada — international medical schools not eligible.

nextAction: For public-safe activation: (a) US + Canada LCME/AOA final-year only; (b) VSLO required; (c) malpractice + criminal background + health insurance verifications required.
plainEnglishSummary: Penn State Hershey accepts visiting fourth-year medical students from LCME or AOA-accredited schools in the US or Canada via VSLO. International medical schools not eligible. Required: $1M/$3M malpractice insurance, personal health insurance, PA criminal background + child abuse + federal fingerprinting clearances.
driftCheck: This advanced national USCE discovery because PA gained a fourth P101 packet; notable expansion to Canadian schools (most other AMCs are US-only).
